title: Mock STOP/TROT Intent Validation
description: Software-only validation that the OpenPAVE runtime can route STOP and TROT through Intent Ingress, Control Daemon, and MockAdapter without physical robot motion.

robot_sensor_endpoint.notes: No physical robot or sensor stream is required.

success_criteria: Intent Ingress accepts normalized STOP and TROT payloads.
Control Daemon writes command result feedback.
MockAdapter reports completed actions without Docker, ROS2, or robot hardware.
